data.body: INVESTIGATION OUTCOME: premise invalidated on implementation. A blanket fail-closed on unresolved blockers broke test_graph_archived_ticket_treated_as_closed — a depends_on whose target dir is absent is DELIBERATELY treated as closed (tombstone-awareness; an archived/deleted blocker must not block forever). resolve_ticket_id returns None for both normal archival and a bogus alias indistinguishably, so there is no clean fail-closed signal. Reverted the readiness changes; delivered instead: a documentation comment in process_link, a boundary+controls regression test, and 'safe broad catch' annotations on gates.py:400 + graph/_graph.py:250. No behavior change. Revising the AC to the honest delivered scope. Commit 974d40a4.
